# DOW-UAP-D27, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 24 October 2025

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

# Misrep undefined-10055709

## Narrative

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

AT 2100Z, (b)(1)1.4a [redacted] TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. (b)(1)1.4a PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING.

AT 1822Z, (b)(1)1.4a WAS 7-LINED. (b)(1)1.4a DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE ON/OFF STATION 1).

AT 2256Z, (b)(1)1.4a CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1).

AT 0444Z, (b)(1)1.4a CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2).

AT 0457Z, DURING RTB (b)(1)1.4a DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1).

AT 0405Z, (b)(1)1.4a RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, (b)(1)1.4a CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS.

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

~~(S/REL TO)~~ [redacted] Mission Narrative

## Admin

### CLASSIFICATION
* Classification: ~~SECRET~~ [redacted]
* Associated Caveats: ~~NOFORN~~ [redacted]
* Classification Source (MS or Classification Guide ID): MS
* Declassification Date (YYYYMMDD): 20490606

### OPERATION
* Operation: ENDURING SENTINEL
* Domain: AIR
* Operations Center: 609th

________________________________________________________________________________
3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b)(6)
________________________________________________________________________________

~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

USCENTCOM MDR 25-0100 thru 25-0103 / JS-250710-TM8S                                10/28/25 001
Approved for Release to AARO

A. BEGIN SCANS AT 75NM WEST, NORTH, AND EAST OF SP FOR DHOWS TRANSITING IN THE DIRECTION OF SP
B. PROVIDE SITREP WITH FLAG STATUS, FLAG, OR NO FLAG VISIBLE AND COUNTRY OF FLAG (IF POSSIBLE), COORDINATES AND OBSERVED ACTIVITY.
C. CALL OUT ANY IDENTIFIABLE EQUIPMENT, COMMS EQUIPMENT, PERSONS WEAPONS, CARGO ON BOARD TO INCLUDE CANCAS COVERED ITEMS
[redacted]

### GENTEXT/NIB
- Gentext: [redacted]
UPON ARRIVAL TO SP AT 2256Z, [redacted] OBSERVED NO PERSONNEL OR VEHICLE ACTIVITY. BETWEEN 2257Z-2330Z, [redacted] CONDUCTED SCANS IVO THE SP AND PROVIDED CALLS ON ANY DHOW ACTIVITY. ITC INTENT MET.
[redacted]
